title: sideritis arborescens var. pauli
intro: Sideritis arborescens var. pauli, also known as the Tree Goldenrod or Paul's Mountain Sideritis, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Sideritis arborescens var. pauli is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits and is also used in traditional remedies.
